lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are flawless, with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Attention project lovers and parts hunters! This vehicle is ready for its next chapter as a dedicated restoration project or a valuable donor car. It’s in rough shape and will require a full overhaul to get back on the road, but it’s a fantastic opportunity for anyone looking for a challenge at an unbeatable price!
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery and carpeting. Mechanically, the car is operational but requires some upcoming maintenance.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior is clean and presents well, though it does have a few minor, superficial stone chips on the front bumper and a small scuff on the rear wheel arch. The interior is in great shape, showing only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster, and all electronics are fully functional. This is a solid, reliable car that has been cared for and is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The engine runs poorly with a significant knock, the transmission slips consistently, and there are multiple fluid leaks. The body shows extensive rust and the interior requires a complete overhaul. It is not roadworthy and will need to be towed away. Best suited as a donor vehicle or for someone with the tools and time for a total rebuild.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic, this automobile offers an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Our rigorous inspection confirms its road-ready status and structural integrity, ensuring it meets the high standards expected of our inventory.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new home! This car has been so good to me—it's in really solid shape and still drives like a absolute dream. It's super clean, reliable, and ready for all your upcoming adventures. I've taken great care of it, and I know you're going to love getting behind the wheel as much as I have. Come check it out and take it for a spin!

Offering a driver-focused E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8 and a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. This example boasts a linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline, supported by documented rod bearing service and preventative throttle actuator replacement. The chassis dynamics are sharp, utilizing the factory M-variable differential lock and multi-link rear suspension for superior lateral grip. Finished in Alpine White, the exterior shows honest wear consistent with enthusiast use, while the mechanical vitals remain robust with a recent Blackstone oil analysis on file. A
Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience that perfectly balances performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor stone chips consistent with careful road use, while the alloy wheels are free of major curbing. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with minimal creasing, and all technological features—including the responsive infotainment system and dual-zone climate control—operate exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, featuring a comprehensive service history and a recently completed multi-point inspection. With a smooth-shifting transmission, quiet engine idle, and significant tread remaining on all four tires, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Presenting in commendable condition, it features a comprehensive service history and has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity. Ideal for the discerning driver who prioritizes reliability and sophisticated engineering, this model offers a refined driving experience at a competitive price point.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. Offering a seamless blend of performance and reliability, this unit stands as a premier selection for those seeking a dependable addition to their fleet. Its condition reflects a high standard of previous ownership, ensuring immediate road-readiness and long-term value for its next proprietor.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this awesome car! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really solid shape, just waiting for someone to take it on its next big road trip. It runs beautifully and has been very well-cared for—you’re going to absolutely love getting behind the wheel!

Used car in good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains its deep luster, showing only the lightest evidence of careful road use, while the interior remains a pristine sanctuary with supple leather seating and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it performs flawlessly—the engine runs smooth and quiet, and the transmission shifts with precision. Having been garage-kept and strictly smoke-free, this car has been treated with the utmost care and is ready for its next chapter. It’s a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking quality and performance without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. It drives like a dream and has plenty of life left in it. I’ve taken great care of it, and I know you’ll love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Experience the perfect balance of performance and practicality with this well-maintained vehicle. Finished in a timeless deep charcoal metallic, the exterior retains a brilliant shine, though it shows minor signs of careful use consistent with its history. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, featuring premium leather upholstery that remains supple and supportive. Mechanically, this car is in excellent shape; it has been serviced regularly, with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires ensuring a smooth, confident ride. All electronics, including the infotainment and climate control, function perfectly. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend getaway, this car offers a reliable and comfortable experience without the premium price of a showroom model. It’s ready for its next owner to drive away today.

The body is remarkably straight, showing only the lightest signs of road use typical of a well-loved car.
